description: Vertical recruitment poster for the Department of Homeland Security 'DHS Career Expo.' The layout has a navy-blue text panel against angled photographic insets. Top-left small caps read 'JOIN DHS.' The large white bold headline states 'FORGE YOUR FUTURE WITH DHS,' followed by event details set off by red vertical accent bars: 'June 5 - 6 / 9 AM - 7 PM ET' and 'Dulles Expo Center / Chantilly, VA.' At left, two people in tan and khaki gear and helmets descend a thick rope; the text 'POLICE FEDERAL AGENT' is visible on a vest. At bottom right, two people in uniform, life vests and helmets stand atop a low-profile vessel at sea with a ship in the background. The bottom-left shows the round DHS seal beside the 'DHS CAREER EXPO' wordmark, and a bottom banner reads 'MAKE AN IMPACT.' The palette is navy, red and white.
notable_text: JOIN DHS. / FORGE YOUR FUTURE WITH DHS / June 5 - 6, 9 AM - 7 PM ET / Dulles Expo Center, Chantilly, VA / DHS CAREER EXPO / MAKE AN IMPACT.
